---
title: "network-data"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)

data_path <- "C:/Users/aderosa/OneDrive - Metropolitan Area Planning Council/Digital Equity - Program Evaluation Research/Data Collection Phase 2/Network Data"


```

```{r}
rapidtec_test <- read_csv(file.path(data_path, "SHA-Properzi_Feb-23--2026_Feb-26--2026.csv"))
```
